title: Halloween Edition: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Ghouling)
description:
Learn how to build a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) workflow using Pipeline Builder, Ontology, and AIP Logic. In this session, we cover dataset preparation, embedding generation, Ontology creation, and semantic search to automatically match entities — in this case, “monsters” — to their best-fit “haunted houses.” You can access the datasources used here: 

hauntology_houses.csv: https://ontologize-portal-public-resources.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/public_datasets/hauntology_houses.csv

hauntology_monsters_all.csv: https://ontologize-portal-public-resources.s3.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/public_datasets/hauntology_monsters_all.csv
